face.shape: oval with defined cheekbones and a sharp jawline
face.skin: porcelain cool-toned, matte finish with soft highlight on cheekbones
face.eyes: almond-shaped, dark brown nearly black, calm steady gaze, no smile reaching the eyes
face.nose: straight narrow bridge with a slightly rounded tip
face.lips: neutral resting pose, full lower lip, nude-mauve matte
face.expression_rule: never smiles. micro-expression only. composure above all.

hair.color: jet black with cool undertones, no warm highlights
hair.texture: straight with a soft center parting
hair.locked_detail: two asymmetric face-framing strands — one longer on the left falling past the jaw, one shorter on the right brushing the cheekbone

wardrobe.driving_mode: black fine-merino turtleneck, matte black leather driving gloves REMOVED — bare hands only, black tailored trousers
wardrobe.editorial_mode: floor-length oxblood silk slip dress with bias cut, no jewellery except a thin silver ear cuff on the left ear
wardrobe.footwear: pointed black leather flats or heeled boots depending on mode

manicure.rule: manicure is the ONLY red note on the hand. no rings. no polish chips.

psychotype: quiet commander — aristocratic detachment fused with predator composure. she holds emotion rather than performing it. suppressed sensuality. authority without effort.
visual_style_dna: anamorphic 2.39:1, crushed blacks, cool Tokyo exterior resolving into warm cabin interior, dominated by black, oxblood red, and silver. fine grain. low-contrast shadow rolloff. no HDR look.
environment_context: Tokyo at night and blue hour — wet asphalt, neon reflections, rain mist, tunnel sodium, shibuya crossing bokeh. cabin interior is the Ferrari F40 — black leather, red stitching, exposed carbon, gated chrome shifter.
universal_negative_prompt: no smile, no teeth showing, no jewellery other than ear cuff, no claw gloves, no silver gloves, no rings, no visible tattoos, no heavy makeup, no glossy skin, no HDR glow, no color shift to warm orange on skin, no symmetrical bangs, no blunt fringe

slugs.identity_short: mid-20s East Asian woman, jet black collarbone hair with two asymmetric face-framing strands, porcelain matte skin, almond dark eyes, nude-mauve matte lips, quiet commander expression
slugs.identity_long: mid-20s East Asian woman, 168-172cm lean build, jet black collarbone-length straight hair with cool undertones, soft center parting, two locked asymmetric face-framing strands (longer left past the jaw, shorter right at the cheekbone), porcelain cool matte skin, oval face, sharp jawline, almond dark-brown eyes with steady unsmiling gaze, straight nose, full lower lip in nude-mauve matte, composure of aristocratic detachment
slugs.wardrobe_driving: black fine-merino turtleneck, bare hands, glossy oxblood almond manicure, black tailored trousers
slugs.wardrobe_editorial: floor-length oxblood silk bias-cut slip dress, thin silver ear cuff on left ear, glossy oxblood almond manicure
slugs.psychotype: quiet commander. does not smile. holds emotion. aristocratic detachment, predator composure, suppressed sensuality
slugs.style_dna: anamorphic 2.39:1, crushed blacks, cool-to-warm Tokyo palette (black + oxblood + silver), fine grain, low-contrast shadow rolloff, no HDR

context_recipes.turnaround_sheet: identity_long + wardrobe_driving + psychotype + style_dna + four-panel turnaround composition
context_recipes.editorial_hero: identity_long + wardrobe_editorial + psychotype + style_dna + full-body portrait on oxblood seamless backdrop
context_recipes.beauty_insert_hands: identity_short (face not shown) + wardrobe_driving + manicure locked + style_dna
context_recipes.silhouette_rear_window: identity_short + silhouette framing against Tokyo neon + style_dna
context_recipes.driving_mid_shot: identity_long + wardrobe_driving + psychotype + style_dna + F40 cabin context
context_recipes.no_character_car: style_dna + environment_context only — character not present

model_routing.nano_banana_pro: use identity_long in Subject block, wardrobe + manicure in Style, psychotype at the end
model_routing.seedance_v2: use identity_short in subject block, drop wardrobe/style into style block, carry negative prompt

usage_instructions: Copy the slugs verbatim. Do not paraphrase.
Select a context_recipe before writing a shot prompt.
If a reference image conflicts with a locked attribute, override in both subject and constraints blocks.

changelog.change: Initial lock from F40 Tokyo project session.
